post.caption:
💡 Want better AI responses?

Simply ask Claude "walk me through your thinking" or "explain your reasoning step-by-step."

You'll get clearer answers AND understand the logic behind them.

#ClaudeAI #AITips #ProductivityHack #AIPrompts

story_data.tip_text: Ask Claude to explain its reasoning process step-by-step
story_data.subtext: You'll get more accurate answers and learn how AI thinks through problems.
